channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ex-L.A. Nonprofit Employee Arrested for Possession of Fentanyl and Meth Near MacArthur Park

item.title: Manipur Security Forces Confiscate Large Weapons Cache and Arrest Four UNLF(P) Insurgents

item.title: Kyle Busch, Legendary NASCAR Driver, Passes Away at 41
item.description: Kyle Busch, a highly accomplished NASCAR driver and two-time Cup Series champion, has passed away at the age of 41. Recognized as one of the most successful drivers across NASCAR’s three national seri...

item.title: NEDC Inspects Ongoing Adamawa Bridge and Youth Development Centre Projects
item.description: The North East Development Commission (NEDC) don show serious appreciation for the work wey dey go on for the five-span bridge at Bole and the Youth Development Centre for Shagari Lelewalji, Yola Sout...

item.title: Pedro Pascal discusses the personal significance of his band t-shirts

item.title: New Zealand Minister Encourages Australian Business Owners Concerned About CGT Changes to Relocate
item.description: New Zealand's finance minister, Nicola Willis, has publicly invited Australians dissatisfied with the recent changes to capital gains tax (CGT) to consider moving their businesses to New Zealand. The ...

item.title: Government Reviews Measures to Manage Rising Current Account Deficit Amid Weak Rupee

item.title: Macau municipal kennels temporarily close as veterinary services remain limited
item.description: The Municipal Affairs Bureau (IAM) in Macau has announced that municipal kennels on the Macau Peninsula will temporarily close to the public starting next month for renovations and maintenance. The bu...

item.title: EACC urges counties to enforce Conflict of Interest Act, 2025 to curb corruption

item.title: The 14th Kingsmead Book Fair explores literature, society, and Joburg's challenges
item.description: The 14th annual Kingsmead Book Fair takes place on Saturday, 23 May 2026, in Johannesburg, in association with Standard Bank. For one day, readers, writers, and curious minds gather not merely to buy ...

item.title: House passes revised Kalinga bill to address oil price surge and energy emergencies
item.description: The House of Representatives has approved the revised Kalinga bill, formally House Bill No. 9305, aimed at mitigating the effects of sudden oil price hikes due to crises like the ongoing Middle East s...

item.title: Deputy Governor Hamzat Confirmed as APC Governorship Candidate for Lagos 2027
item.description: The Lagos State chapter of the All Progressives Congress (APC) don officially select Deputy Governor Obafemi Hamzat as their governorship candidate for the 2027 elections. The primary election, wey ha...

item.title: NASCAR star Kyle Busch passes away at 41 following severe illness
item.description: Kyle Busch, a two-time NASCAR Cup Series champion and one of the most successful drivers across NASCAR’s three national series, has passed away at the age of 41. The Busch family, along with Richard C...

item.title: Saanich Man Sentenced After Conviction in Large-Scale Voyeurism Case Affecting 652 Victims
item.description: A man from Saanich, British Columbia, has been sentenced following his guilty plea in what has been identified as Canada’s largest voyeurism case, involving 652 victims. The case, which shocked the co...

item.title: Rita Moreno: Celebrating the Life and Career of an EGOT Award Winner
item.description: Rita Moreno, born in Puerto Rico and later relocating to New York City as a child, is a trailblazer in the entertainment industry and one of the few performers to achieve EGOT status, winning an Emmy,...
